description: Create a content slide in a full-width ranked table layout showing BJ/SH top 3 luxury brands by category in 2011, with category rows and highlighted new entrants versus overall China market in 2010.

header.headline: BJ/SH: a few new brands entered top 3 in BJ/SH compared with overall China market in 2010
header.sub: "What are the top 3 brands you are most likely to purchase in each category in 2011?" BJ/SH ONLY

footer.source: Base: respondents in Beijing/Shanghai only; highlights indicate new brands entering top 3 versus overall China market in 2010
